notes: Fires for every fund_universe.series_id during build_entities --reset step 6. Closing this writer means fund classification must come from fund_universe.fund_strategy column directly via reader migration. Refactor option: keep entity row but skip ECH insert when entity_type='fund'.

The 'remaining' loop catches entities not classified by seeds/managers/funds. For 1876 fund-typed eids this means funds that exist in entities but not in fund_universe at build time (orphan funds created earlier via resolve_pending_series). One-line fix: filter remaining query to entity_type<>'fund'.

Fires when N-PORT pending series resolution creates a new fund entity. Skip the INSERT for new fund_eid; classification belongs in fund_universe.fund_strategy. Pending series feeder still runs; only the ECH write goes.
